summary: Frontend route bug fix verified. Admin routes (/admin/login, /admin/setup-2fa, /admin) now correctly render AdminLoginPage instead of being intercepted by SEO dynamic routes (/:country/:city). All public and SEO routes still function correctly.

backend_issues.notes: Backend testing skipped per request - frontend only

passed_tests: ✓ /admin/login renders Admin Login page (dark theme with 'Admin Access' title, data-testid='admin-login-page' present)
✓ /admin/setup-2fa renders Admin Login page via catch-all route (/admin/*)
✓ / (Home page) renders Bookvia homepage with hero section
✓ /login renders User Login page (light theme, 'Bienvenido de vuelta')
✓ /mx (SEO Country page) renders correctly with 'Ciudades' and city list
✓ /mx/cdmx (SEO City page) renders correctly with categories

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Admin routes (/admin, /admin/login, /admin/setup-2fa) were being intercepted by SEO dynamic routes (/:country/:city), showing incorrect SEO pages instead of Admin pages
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Routes reordered in App.js - admin routes now defined BEFORE SEO dynamic routes, plus catch-all /admin/* added
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: FIXED - All admin routes now correctly render AdminLoginPage
key_changes: Lines 97-101: Admin routes defined before SEO routes
Line 37 in AdminDashboardPage: Redirect uses /admin/login instead of /admin/setup-2fa

critical_code_review_comments: Route order in App.js correctly prioritizes admin routes before dynamic SEO routes
Catch-all /admin/* ensures any undefined admin sub-routes show login page
AdminDashboardPage correctly redirects unauthenticated users to /admin/login
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin route bug is fixed. Key routes verified: /admin/login shows Admin Access page (dark theme), /admin/setup-2fa shows same via catch-all, /admin redirects to /admin/login. SEO routes (/mx, /mx/cdmx) still work correctly and are not affected by the fix. App language is Spanish.
